en.extract:
The rufous-breasted bush robin (Tarsiger hyperythrus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.
It is found in Bangladesh, Bhutan, southwestern China, northeast India, northern Myanmar and Nepal.
Its natural habitat is temperate forests.

The '''rufous-breasted bush robin''' ('''''Tarsiger hyperythrus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].
It is found in [[Bangladesh]], [[Bhutan]], southwestern China, northeast India, northern [[Myanmar]] and [[Nepal]].<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" />
Its natural [[habitat]] is temperate [[forest]]s.
[[File:Rufous-breasted Bush Robin Pangolakha Wildlife Sanctuary East Sikkim India 19.04.2016.jpg|thumb|left|From [[Pangolakha Wildlife Sanctuary]], [[East Sikkim]], India.]]

zh.extract:
棕腹林鸲（学名：Tarsiger hyperythrus）为鶲科鸲属的鸟类。分布于尼泊尔、不丹、印度、缅甸以及中国大陆的西藏、东抵云南西北部怒江和澜沧江流域等地，多见于高山沟谷（在云南高黎贡山地区、海拔为1950-3200米）低处常绿阔叶林下的灌丛以及或稀树草地的杜鹃丛间。该物种的模式产地在印度Darjeeling。
